paper.title: New nearby hypervelocity stars and their spatial distribution from Gaia DR2

extraction.summary: 论文从Gaia DR2识别了56颗超高速星候选体：28颗基于5D切向速度(P_ub>0.99)的近邻晚型HVS，28颗基于6D全速度(P_ub>0.5)。6D样本中3颗可能源自银心(HS, P_gc>0.16)，12颗可能源自河外(OUT)，13颗为超高速逃逸星(HRS)。12颗曾被其他巡天报道。共提取56颗候选体(5D: 28, 6D: 28)。

method_chain.summary: Gaia DR2 astrometry with parallax uncertainty < 20%. For 6D: RV with rv_nb_transits > 5.
Bayesian distance (Bailer-Jones 2018 prior). Parallax zero-point -0.029 mas.
R_o=8.2 kpc, V_LSR=232.8 km/s. V_gc and V_tan computed.
MCMC with EMCEE: 20 walkers, 1000 steps, 10k samples. sigma_V/V < 0.3 cut.
Backward 5 Gyr orbit integration. P_gc (R_min < 1 kpc), P_MW (R_min < 25 kpc).
28 stars P_ub>0.99 from 5D. 28 stars P_ub>0.5 from 6D (3 HS, 12 OUT, 13 HRS). 12 prior catalog stars.

candidate_groups_considered.description: 28 stars from Gaia DR2 5D with P_ub>0.99, d<6 kpc, late-type.
28 stars from Gaia DR2 6D with P_ub>0.5: 3 HS, 12 OUT, 13 HRS.
